expectations.text: Looks for relevant patterns elsewhere in this repository instead of inventing the design in isolation.
expectations.evidence: References feature-dev skill, template, and eval files.

expectations.text: Creates a concrete file-backed handoff artifact at a path matching the workflow's handoff contract.
The artifact content follows a reusable template shape and includes implementation slices, file-level map, and validation plan.
expectations.evidence: Artifact includes slices, file map, and validation sections.

expectations.text: Artifact metadata fields are concretely filled (no placeholder bracket values) for status, track, and next step.
Each referenced file in Relevant Findings includes why that file matters.
expectations.evidence: Relevant Findings contains file-specific purpose statements.

expectations.text: Open questions are tightly bounded to truly blocking items and include risk framing.
expectations.evidence: Keeps uncertainty bounded; risk-aware framing present.

expectations.text: Provides artifact status in the response with the exact artifact path.
expectations.evidence: Final response includes Artifact Status with exact path.

expectations.text: Includes rationale or trade-offs for the proposed design.
expectations.evidence: Mentions tightening must-level policy and benchmark reliability rationale.
